channel.title: Suricata on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Suricata on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: Splunk-NerisBot
item.description: A victim host downloaded multiple malicious executables via HTTP, including Emotet, ransomware, and trojan payloads, detected through Suricata IDS alerts and confirmed malicious via VirusTotal.

item.title: Wazuh + Suricata: Malware traffic
item.description: Replayed a malicious PCAP file containing Hancitor dropper traffic that deployed Cobalt Strike, Dridex, and Ficker Stealer. Analyzed 423 Suricata alerts in Wazuh, reconstructed the full infection chain, and mapped findings to MITRE ATT&CK.
